codeReview.summary: Feature implementation covers the contract: new `spikes mcp install` command (with `--json`), detection/output behavior for Claude Desktop and Cursor, `smithery.yaml` with 9 tools matching source, and `site/agents.md` with required agent-facing sections and tool parity. No blocking correctness, regression, security, or contract-compliance issues were found.

issues.description: Manual Claude Desktop config path is hard-coded to a macOS location in the no-client-detected JSON/manual output. On Linux/Windows this path hint is inaccurate, though the config block itself remains valid.

sharedStateObservations.observation: `worker-fullstack` skill has inconsistent documentation guidance for markdown location: it explicitly includes site-content work (including `agents.md`) but the procedure section says to create/update markdown files in `./docs/`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/worker-fullstack/SKILL.md:13 lists site content (`agents.md`), while line 38 says markdown should be in `./docs/`.

summary: PASS: The mcp-install-and-registry feature is implemented as specified, with all required deliverables present and aligned to the source tool surface (9 MCP tools). One minor non-blocking UX/docs-path issue was noted.
